title: oxydectes althaeifolia
side_effects: Oxydectes althaeifolia can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues, as well as gastrointestinal problems like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe side effects, including headaches, dizziness, and an increased risk of bleeding or bruising. Some individuals may also experience interactions with other medications, such as blood thinners, which can exacerbate the side effects. In rare cases, improper use of oxydectes althaeifolia can even cause liver or kidney damage.
